scripts.stop: if [ -f .server.pid ]; then kill $(cat .server.pid) 2>/dev/null && rm -f .server.pid && echo 'Server stopped (via PID file)'; fi; lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null && echo 'Killed process on port 8080' || true
scripts.clean: echo 'Killing all python http.server processes...'; ps aux | grep 'python3.*http.server\|python3.*serve.py' | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; rm -f .server.pid; echo 'Done'
